hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates and standardizes outputs from multiple blockchain analytics providers to give compliance teams consistent, audit-ready KYT data and streamline wallet risk workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT outputs remain inconsistent and siloed
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams struggle to unify and interpret risk signals from multiple KYT providers across separate tools. This fragmentation slows risk assessment, weakens traceability and complicates audit readiness for wallet and transaction screening workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates and standardizes wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple KYT providers into one unified workflow, enabling compliance teams to assess risk faster with clearer traceability and audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From KYT provider outputs to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY normalizes multi-vendor KYT data, applies internal rules, routes wallet risk for manual review, opens cases, preserves evidence and supports compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated analytics. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY normalizes KYT data from multiple providers into a unified workflow, linking alerts, cases, decisions and evidence for clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs that need normalized KYT data, audit-proof evidence and enterprise control for scalable compliance and bank due diligence from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY normalize KYT data from multiple providers
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT outputs are connected into case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how normalized wallet risk supports audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY manages provider orchestration for KYT review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT provider normalization?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves as a compliance layer that normalizes and connects KYT data from various providers into connected risk views and structured workflows for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect multiple KYT providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY maps and standardizes disparate KYT alerts and scores across providers, routing cases and alerts into a single, consistent compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYT audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, links related wallet and transaction data, and preserves provider outputs as evidence supporting audit-ready review and reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing KYT stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYT and blockchain analytics tools without replacing them, adding a control layer over your existing compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT providers but connects their outputs into one consolidated compliance operating system.
final_title: Normalize KYT outputs into connected wallet risk data
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates and standardizes multiple KYT provider results into audit-ready wallets risk workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
